name: aioffice-hwp
description: Read, create, and edit Korean Hangul Word Processor documents (.hwp / .hwpx) in Codex. Built on the rhwp WebAssembly viewer/editor — no Hancom Office, no LibreOffice, no Windows COM required.

interface.shortDescription: Read, create, and edit Korean .hwp / .hwpx documents — no Hancom Office needed
interface.longDescription: AIOFFICE-HWP lets the agent read, create, and edit Korean Hangul Word Processor documents (.hwp and .hwpx) with a local preview viewer. It is built on the rhwp WebAssembly core with byte-level in-place editing that stays compatible with Hancom Office and Hancom Docs, plus a secure form-fill flow that keeps personal data out of the model context.
